Name: Grace's Namecard
Desc: Obtained by unlocking Grace's Mindscape Cinema [Chief Mechanic].
Desc2:
A card with the Belobog Industries' technician emblem printed on it.
Grace randomly hands out these cards to people, so they can contact her most easily. The number on the card is the only way to contact her, so don't worry about it. This isn't the card you're looking for.
